patches.name: Agrisense with AVR_IOT
patches.note: Verified Avnet/IOTCONNECT C SDK repo (iotc-arduino-mchp-avr-sdk) for AVR IoT Cellular Mini; Arduino-based, C/C++ (SDK is C, demo uses C SDK per context). No Agrisense-specific repo exists. Replaced generic Hackster getting-started link (WebFetch confirmed it's NOT agriculture-related) with the directly relevant Avnet webinar 'Developing a Soil Moisture Sensor with the AVR-IoT Cellular Mini Board and Avnet IoTConnect' (YouTube). High confidence.

patches.name: Drone
patches.note: Indeema "Connected UAV Drone Platform" — firmware bridge connecting drones to AWS via /IOTCONNECT (AWS IoT Core/Greengrass). Optimized flight firmware -> C/C++. No GitHub repo exists (checked avnet-iotconnect org + searches). Replaced generic Indeema services page with the /IOTCONNECT-specific AWS Marketplace listing. Image is a verified-hotlinkable PNG of the Indeema drone project from the Scroll Media article.

patches.name: Telehealth Mobile Gateway
patches.note: No-code /IOTCONNECT mobile gateway app (iOS/Android) bridges BLE health sensors to cloud; matches Microchip Telehealth Remote Patient Monitoring Reference Design. Repo iotc-gateway-mobile-app verified via GitHub. Current link verified as valid telehealth dashboard PNG (Temp/Pulse/SpO2). High confidence.

patches.name: Edge People Detection & Tracking with Ryzen 7 AI
patches.note: No dedicated GitHub repo or Avnet/Hackster demo page found for this exact demo in github.com/avnet-iotconnect or github.com/Avnet (searched ryzen/amd/advantech/people/detection - none match). Language inferred as Python (AMD Ryzen AI Software / ONNX Runtime + YOLO vision stack; comparable AMD Ryzen AI object-detection Hackster demos are Python). Best verified public URL is the Advantech SOM-6873 product page (the target hardware), which describes its AMD XDNA NPU vision/AI capability. Medium confidence on link; low confidence a project-specific page exists.

patches.name: EV Charging - Commercial
patches.note: Witekio EV charging software demo on Tria/NXP SM2S-IMX8PLUS (i.MX8M Plus, Linux) with IOTCONNECT + smart-charger load balancing. Current Witekio blog link verified live (HTTP 200 via browser UA; WebFetch gets bot-blocked 403) and is the canonical demo page — no better Avnet/Hackster/video page found. Lang = C++ (i.MX Linux app, Witekio's typical stack). Found avnet-iotconnect/iotc-evse-example repo but it is an Azure RTOS MCU C SDK example, a different EVSE target, so left repo blank rather than mismatch. Medium confidence on language; high on link.

patches.name: FPGA-Driven Industrial Gesture Recognition
patches.note: Verified Hackster page: ASL classification with Vitis AI on ZUBoard 1CG (also Ultra96-V2), Zynq UltraScale+. Python/Jupyter implementation (asl_classify_live.py, OpenCV, MobileNetV2/VGG-16 DPU deployment). Real repo github.com/AlbertaBeef/asl_tutorial confirmed (99% Jupyter Notebook). No dedicated avnet-iotconnect or Avnet repo found for this specific demo. Current link is good and relevant; kept it.

patches.name: Hand-Gesture Robotics Control
patches.note: Verified repo github.com/Avnet/hand_controller ("Control a ROS2 robot using your hands", Python 96.1%, release tag GTKGUI-6490, Nov 2025) — the actual implementation for this QCS6490/Vision AI-Kit 6490 hand-gesture ROS2 robot demo. Link is the Hackster "Hand-Controlled Robot Car" quickstart (Houston/Bergeron/Saka, Dec 2025) covering the exact demo. High confidence.

patches.name: Multi Stream Video and AI
patches.note: No dedicated GitHub repo exists for this IQ9 demo (checked avnet-iotconnect and Avnet orgs; only related repo Avnet/QCS6490-Vision-AI-Demo targets the 6490 kit, max 2 models, not IQ9's 9 feeds). Best link is the YouTube video "Multi-Stream Edge AI with Qualcomm Dragonwing demo at Embedded World 2025" showing multiple concurrent streams + multiple AI models in real time on Dragonwing IQ9. Demos/example apps are Python (GStreamer/GTK) on Yocto Linux. Medium confidence on link match; high on language and no-repo.

patches.name: Smart Asset Monitoring
patches.note: "Smart Asset Monitoring" is an Avnet /IOTCONNECT Solution Accelerator (cloud dashboard with KPIs, anomaly detection, predictive analytics) layered on edge telemetry; no demo-specific GitHub repo exists. Target boards (PolarFire MPFS-DISCO-KIT, SAMA7D65 EV63J76A) are enabled via the Python Lite SDK demos, so language is Python. Link points to the verified-live PolarFire SoC DK QuickStart demo (SAMA7D65 equivalent: .../microchip-sama7d65-curiosity). Avnet solution pages (avnet.com .../iot-accelerators/asset-monitoring/ and AWS Marketplace listing) exist but block automated fetch (HTTP 400). Medium confidence on link choice.

patches.name: Smart Tractor
patches.note: No demo-specific repo exists: searched github.com/avnet-iotconnect (tractor/simpleflex/sm2s/imx8 all 0 hits) and Avnet org. It's a Linux/Yocto MPU app on Tria SM2S-IMX8PLUS; /IOTCONNECT path is the Python SDK (iotc-yocto-python-sdk has an sm2s-imx8mp board readme), so language=Python. No Smart-Tractor-specific Hackster/video/blog found; best verified URL is the target hardware (SimpleFlex SMARC COM) product page on Tria (formerly embedded.avnet.com, now 301-redirects to tria-technologies.com). Medium confidence on link, high on no-repo.

verify.checked:
Verified all 10 patches by WebFetching the questionable image and link URLs.

IMAGES (both resolve as valid PNGs, NOT problems):
- Drone image https://scroll.media/.../indeema-office_drone-project-scaled.png -> downloaded as valid image/png (1012KB). Real image.
- Telehealth image https://saleshosted.z13.web.core.windows.net/dashboard/r2/mcp-telehealth.png -> downloaded as valid image/png (73KB). Real image. (The text-rendering helper reported both as "corrupted" only because it cannot render binary; the binaries downloaded fine and are valid PNGs.)

LINKS (all resolve and match their demos):
- Agrisense YouTube OFP0efBtGyg -> title "Developing a Soil Moisture Sensor with the AVR-IoT Cellular Mini Board and Avnet IoTConnect". Matches. C/Arduino plausible.
- Drone AWS Marketplace prodview-cskaj6vsde6xu -> "Connected UAV Drone Platform by Indeema", sold by Avnet, built on /IOTCONNECT. Exact match. C++ plausible.
- Telehealth repo/link github.com/avnet-iotconnect/iotc-gateway-mobile-app -> valid. Mobile language fits.
- Advantech SOM-6873 page -> valid; AMD Ryzen Embedded 8000 + AMD XDNA NPU 16 TOPS confirmed. Python (Ryzen AI/ONNX/YOLO) is a reasonable inference for a vision demo.
- EV Charging Witekio blog -> HTTP 403 (bot-blocked). Note already discloses this and says it is live via browser UA. Not a fabrication; consistent with note.
- FPGA Gesture Hackster asl-classification-with-vitis-ai-025765 -> valid; ASL classification, Vitis AI, ZUBoard 1CG/Ultra96-V2, Python scripts (asl_classify_live.py). Repo AlbertaBeef/asl_tutorial matches. Correct.
- Hand-Gesture Hackster 538636/hand-controlled-robot-car-5324ec -> valid; Tria Vision AI Kit 6490 (QCS6490), ROS2 distributed app, GTK + Flask UI, Python. Matches repo Avnet/hand_controller. Correct.
- Multi Stream YouTube mNAb2_xOkrs -> title "Multi-Stream Edge AI with Qualcomm Dragonwing demo at Embedded World 2025". Matches (video does not name IQ9 explicitly, but Dragonwing multi-stream is the right demo). Python plausible.
- Smart Asset Monitoring github.com/avnet-iotconnect/iotc-python-lite-sdk-demos/tree/main/microchip-polarfire-soc-dk -> valid; PolarFire SoC DK + IoTConnect Python Lite SDK. Python fits.
- Smart Tractor tria-technologies.com/product/tria-sm2s-imx8plus/ -> valid; Tria SM2S-IMX8PLUS SMARC (i.MX 8M Plus), Linux/Android/Windows BSPs. Python (Yocto Python SDK) plausible.
